title: Video SRE inženieris / Video SRE Engineer

summary.lv: Video SRE inženieris Evolution video komandā, kas izstrādā un uztur Linux bāzētas video kodēšanas un straumēšanas sistēmas ar 5+ gadu Linux administrēšanas pieredzi.
summary.en: Video SRE Engineer at Evolution's video team deploying and maintaining Linux-based video encoding and streaming systems, with 5+ years of Linux server administration experience.
